entry.subject: Dont fucking pull the tie bitch!
entry.event: I drink to get completely hammered so to speak. Then at the end of the night im wishing i hadnt drink so much. The money lost/spend, cigarettes lost, fights i nearly get in, getting kicked out for falling asleep and generally being an asshole. I dont like it much. Theres no happy medium.
I enjoyed the limelight last night! And i didnt get drunk! It rocked. Its times like this that make me sit back and think about how good life can be. I just gotta start saving more money!

entry.subject: Starsailor
entry.event: Starsailor are playing mandella hall monday 19 dec You gotta go! (I dont wanna have to go on my own...)
